sub_modules.bitrev_addr: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal address computation used to reorder input samples into bit-reversed order before the iterative FFT stages.
sub_modules.stage_index_gen: Combinational logic that computes the butterfly pair indices (p_idx, q_idx) and twiddle ROM index for a given stage number and butterfly counter within that stage.
sub_modules.twiddle_rom: Combinational lookup table providing Q1.15 fixed-point cos/sin twiddle coefficients for indices 0..15, matching the specified twiddle factor convention.
sub_modules.butterfly_unit: Combinational radix-2 DIT butterfly: multiplies the q-sample by the twiddle factor (conjugated for IFFT mode), then computes p+t and p-t sum/difference outputs.
